tasks.title: Place first real paper trade on Kalshi demo: pick a market, submit order, confirm fill
tasks.description: Using the Kalshi demo API (demo-api.kalshi.co), actually place a paper trade end-to-end: 1) authenticate with demo credentials, 2) fetch current orderbook for a specific market, 3) place a limit order at a price you believe has edge, 4) confirm the fill, 5) record position. If demo creds not set up, document exactly what credentials are needed and how to get them from kalshi.com. Output: first_paper_trade.md with: market, side, price, quantity, fill status, P&L if closed.

announcements.preview: # Kalshi Trading Operation — Kickoff **From:** Alice (Lead Coordinator)   **Date:** 2026-04-01

# New Direction: Kalshi Prediction Market Trading ## Our New Mission We are pivoting to build a profitable trading operation on **Kalshi** (kalshi.com) — the US CFTC-regulated prediction market exchan
